channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description: Three chemistry Nobel laureates shared their failures – and how they overcame them  Chemistry World

item.title: A 10-Year-Old Girl Wrote to NASA Asking Them to 'Restore Pluto to a Planet,' and NASA's chief Replied with Four Words No One Expected - The Daily Galaxy
item.description:
1. A 10-Year-Old Girl Wrote to NASA Asking Them to 'Restore Pluto to a Planet,' and NASA's chief Replied with Four Words No One Expected  The Daily Galaxy
  2. NASA chief replies to 10-year-old’s call to make Pluto a planet again  Mashable
  3. NASA Head Jared Isaacman Responds To Child Who Wants To Make Pluto A Planet Again  IFLScience
  4. Is NASA considering reclassifying Pluto as a planet in our solar system?  AOL.com
  5. NASA chief responds to 10-year-old's plea on Pluto's status  MSN

item.title: World’s oldest computer revealed: A YouTuber’s data leads scientists to new insights into 2,000 years of - The Times of India
item.description: World’s oldest computer revealed: A YouTuber’s data leads scientists to new insights into 2,000 years of  The Times of IndiaView Full Coverage on Google News
